Who's Who in Riemann Hypothesis Research

Who's Who in Riemann Hypothesis Research

A ranked directory of researchers active on the Riemann hypothesis and the zeros of the zeta and L-functions.

Version 1 (arXiv-based). This first ranking is built from 100 qualifying researchers in the arXiv math.NT corpus (papers matching a curated set of 15 Riemann-hypothesis terms, title-weighted). The OpenAlex and zbMATH signals, the regional maps, coauthorship network, genealogy, and In Memoriam pages, all present on the sister site wwigr.org, are being integrated next. Sister project to Who's Who in Goldbach Research.

Ranked from arXiv topical output. Methodology and the full three-source ranking are in progress. Spotted an error, or prefer not to be listed? Email admin@wwirh.org.

An independent, non-commercial project. Data: arXiv (OpenAlex + zbMATH integration in progress). Built 2026-06-07.
